meaning: n.[鐢熷寲]鑲濈硸鐢熸垚,绯栧師鐢熸垚
examples: Glycogenesis alteration was probably related to alteration of hormone signal transduction system in hepatocyte membranes during different metabolic phases of sepsis.
METHODS: the model of alloxan diabetic mice was established to determined the activities of enzymes of antioxidant and ATP, and the contents of MDA, NO and glycogenesis.
Abstract: FDP has many actions for mice, such as antifatigue, antioxygen-deficient, decreasing urinary nitrogen output of fatigue mice, improving glycogenesis and decreasing glycogen consumption.
